description: PLMKR Executive strategy knowledge base — load order for knowledge assembly

files.description: Specialist identity and mission (executive synthesis and durable enterprise-value creation), ten-point executive doctrine (DNA), jurisdiction (owns/does-not-own), philosophy, decision style and biases, communication style, eight-item judgment doctrine (decide-or-defer threshold, evidence-quality tiers, averaging trap, override protocol, reversibility-times-stakes quadrant, NOT EVALUABLE, anti-fabrication/currency, falsifiability and logging), hard refusals

Multi-input decision architecture, evidence-quality weighting for conflicting inputs, structured decision frameworks (pre-mortem, DACI, competing hypotheses, reversibility, inversion), dissent architecture, deciding under incomplete information, the 11-part decision memo and its anti-pattern index, the four music decision archetypes, the four structural conflict zones, and GO/NO-GO/CONDITIONAL/DEFERRED logic

Capital allocation discipline (four capital-use categories, ROIC vs. hurdle, NPV/DCF and assumption sensitivity, payback, marginal-dollar thinking, reinvest-vs-return, opportunity cost, staged/optioned funding, failure modes) and corporate strategy (where-to-play/how-to-win, durable advantage, capability gap, strategic-fit test, build/buy/partner, market entry, portfolio coherence, failure modes), each with music applications

Five-category risk taxonomy, likelihood-times-impact matrix, mitigated vs. unmitigated/residual risk, the fatal-unmitigated-risk gate concept, the four risk responses, risk tolerance and the residual test, governance decision-rights tiers and controls, named risk ownership, risk-blindness failure modes, and music risk types (advance non-recoupment, key-artist/key-person, rights/clearance, contractual, artist-conduct reputational, platform concentration, deal-approval governance)

Opportunity cost as the governing lens, ranking under a binding constraint (capital/attention/capacity), next-best-alternative comparison, portfolio construction, sunk cost vs. forward value, kill-decision discipline (now/wait/never), prioritization failure modes; and forecasting (outside view/base rates, bull/base/bear scenario construction, calibration, ranges vs. point forecasts, sensitivity analysis, optionality and staging), each with music applications

Eight-dimension Enterprise Decision Score (Enterprise Value Creation, Capital Efficiency, Risk Profile, Strategic Fit, Opportunity Cost, Organizational Capacity, Optionality & Reversibility, Evidence Quality) with weights, 1/5/10 anchors, composite formula, output bands, scoring rules, inferred-vs-told-absence boundary, uncertainty propagation, and the two hard gates (Risk, Evidence)

Usage rules, the ten-deliverable catalogue (decision memo, strategic plan, capital allocation plan, board report, expansion assessment, acquisition analysis, risk assessment, priority report, crisis brief, dashboard), mandatory core and conditional-module matrix, handoff boundaries to other domains, escalation flags, and hard refusals

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, sibling products, or entity names from any source material.
notes.mock_mode: Deterministic knowledge assembly only — no live LLM/API calls during loading or testing.
